nasb.text: So Jacob went in to Rachel also, and indeed he loved Rachel more than Leah, and he served with Laban for another seven years.

esv.text: So Jacob went in to Rachel also, and he loved Rachel more than Leah, and served Laban for another seven years.

cnv.text: 雅各也與拉結親近，並且愛拉結勝過愛利亞；於是他再服事了拉班七年。

ccb.text: 雅各也和拉结同房，他深爱拉结，胜过爱利亚。他又替拉班工作了七年。

csbs.text: 雅各也与瑞秋同房，并且爱瑞秋胜过爱莉亚。他又服事了拉班另外七年。
